Additional ✨information✨

So, in this you basically replace the role of Achillean (think of it as a Achillean!user) as you take him into the Sendaris clan and become friends.

you can be a human, ardoni, felina, magnorite, etc.

your persona doesn't have to like fighting but can :P

everything in this scenario happens BEFORE the great war and don't call him "Deathsinger", he doesn't have that name in here since this is all before the great war.

yes, you're js like Achillean. You were also part of the Nestoris clan, found him while fishing, he got taken in, you taught him how to fish, became friends with him and Ingressus taught you how to fight.

this also plays BEFORE the tournament.

idk what to add anymore even tho there might be more but just ask me if you have any question lmao.

Enjoy this bot !! <3
